prestazioni: Garrett GT2259S turbocharger upgrade for the 1.4L GSE T4 (FireFly) engine (code: GSE14F), paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Armytrix to eliminate turbo lag and support 280+ HP on 98 RON fuel

Fully forged internals by JE Pistons (87mm forged pistons, H-beam connecting rods) and ACL Race Series bearings, mated to a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance, allowing safe 8,500 RPM redline and 1.5 bar boost pressure

Motec M150 ECU with custom calibration by Viezu Technologies, integrating a Bosch Motorsport 0281002946 high-flow fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a custom 3-inch intake system with a K&N Racing conical filter and heat-shielded silicone couplers
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pulse-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and ducktail spoiler, reducing lift by 35% at 120 mph per Abarth Aerodynamics Lab testing

OMP Carbon-Kevlar racing seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, mounted on custom FIA-approved bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages UK, painted in Abarth Scorpion Yellow with black leather Alcantara upholstery

Enkei PF07 wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +38 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers and 380mm two-piece rotors up front
